data.body: S5 live E2E run (session 3) — committed driver: infra/gerrit/feature-branch-e2e.sh + feature-branch-e2e-scenarios.sh (HTTPS/REST, reuses reviewbot-e2e.sh conventions; 7 scenario fns). Throwaway branch feature/e2e-20260704. SCENARIO 2 (stacking) PASS live: change 248 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/248) pushed to refs/for/feature/e2e-20260704; LLM-Review=+1 (rebar review bot 1000002); reviewed diff = docs/e2e/s2-stacked-*.txt ONLY (delta_only, R1 proven — reviewed diff covers just its own delta, not accumulated history). CI (gerrit-verify run 28688669163) dispatched on the feature branch via g2p workflow_dispatch — confirms webhook+g2p branch-agnostic dispatch on feature/*.
